slides.title: What We Did & The Move
did: Reviewed all active LEM campaigns across website and pre-lander funnels
Identified clear winners driving ROAS above floor and flagged underperformers below kill criteria
Killed underperforming campaigns / scaled Nancy-Momo-3 / reduced Hello-Nancy-15_Manus Menopause by 10%
Uploaded LEM assets to different campaigns
slides.binding_constraint: LEM ROAS 1.9 yesterday · 1.8 L7D · 1.8 L30D. Website below target (2.1); Pre-Lander below target (1.9). Meta spend $72.1K yesterday.

decisions.decision: Create Zenify Campaigns — Winner and Testing campaigns; direct all test creatives here to push spend to Zenify (proven high CVR)
Set up campaign directing to new LP (https://get.officialnancy.com/lem-reverse/)
Identify what's working across active campaigns; brief creative providers to build iterations of top performers to scale into Phase 2
